description.overview: The 'monkey dog' (Affen means monkey in German) is a fearless little terrier with a big personality. They're curious, playful, and always entertaining.
description.temperament: Known for being confident, fearless, funny.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough, harsh, wiry coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The 'monkey dog' (Affen means monkey in German) is a fearless little terrier with a big personality. They're curious, playful, and always entertaining.
